SEARCH
Package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap

Class FabricBootstrap.Builder

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.FabricBootstrap.Builder
Enclosing class:
FabricBootstrap
public static final class FabricBootstrap.Builder extends Object
Builder for wiring MagicUtils services on Fabric.
